tools.name: flows.createEngagement

tools.name: flows.createExecution
tools.description: Triggers a new Execution for the Flow

tools.name: flows.deleteEngagement
tools.description: Delete this Engagement and all Steps relating to it.

tools.description: Delete the Execution and all Steps relating to it.

tools.name: flows.deleteFlow
tools.description: Delete a specific Flow.

tools.name: flows.fetchEngagement
tools.description: Retrieve an Engagement

tools.description: Retrieve the most recent context for an Engagement.

tools.name: flows.fetchExecution
tools.description: Retrieve an Execution

tools.name: flows.fetchExecutionContext
tools.description: Retrieve the most recent context for an Execution.

tools.name: flows.fetchExecutionStep
tools.description: Retrieve a Step.

tools.description: Retrieve the context for an Execution Step.

tools.name: flows.fetchFlow
tools.description: Retrieve a specific Flow.

tools.name: flows.fetchStep
tools.description: Retrieve a Step.

tools.name: flows.fetchStepContext
tools.description: Retrieve the context for an Engagement Step.

tools.name: flows.listEngagement
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Engagements for the Flow.

tools.name: flows.listExecution
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Executions for the Flow.

tools.name: flows.listFlow
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Flows.

tools.name: flows.listStep
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Steps for an Engagement.

tools.name: flows.updateExecution
tools.description: Update the status of an Execution to `ended`.

tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source
